{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Tomb Hydras
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Forger technique]] from the [[Tomb Hydras]] is attacking [[Eithan]]'s [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The group is in the opposite direction of the [[Tomb Hydras]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
